[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010000 1
1 0100110001 4
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000110001 3
5 0000000011 2
6 0000000100 1
7 1001100100 4

01 10 0000000011 2 match 5
12 21 0000000100 1 match 6
23 32 1001100100 4 match 7
34 43 0100111010 5
45 54 0110000011 4
56 65 0000000000 a match 2 3
67 76 0000010000 1 match 0
70 07 0000110001 3 match 4

02 20 0000100000 1
13 31 0000001110 3
24 42 0010100000 2
35 53 0101000110 4
46 64 0000010000 1 match 0
57 75 0101000101 4
60 06 0000010000 1 match 0
71 17 0000000101 2

03 30 0000110010 3
14 41 0000001011 3
25 52 0011000100 3
36 63 0000010000 1 match 0
47 74 0100110001 4 match 1
50 05 0000000011 2 match 5
61 16 0000000000 a match 2 3
72 27 0001100100 3

04 40 0000110011 4
15 51 0000000111 3
26 62 0000000000 a match 2 3
37 73 0101110100 5
